Faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
Faq.vazio: No questions available at the moment.

q1.pergunta: How does booking a chalet work?
q1.resposta: Choose your check-in and check-out dates in the Home search, pick an available chalet and confirm your details. The booking stays with a simulated payment pending for up to 48 hours — if it isn't confirmed within that time, it's automatically cancelled and the dates become available again.

q2.resposta: No. Chalé Online is a portfolio project and the payment is simulated — no real amount is ever charged. The simulation exists only to demonstrate the full booking flow, from check-in to payment.

q3.pergunta: How long do I have to confirm payment before the booking expires?
q3.resposta: 48 hours from the moment the booking is created. After that, if the simulated payment hasn't been completed, the booking is automatically cancelled and the reserved nights become available to other guests again.

q4.pergunta: Can I cancel a booking that's already confirmed?
q4.resposta: Cancelling already-paid bookings isn't available in this version of the product. If your booking still has a pending payment, it's automatically cancelled after 48 hours without confirmation.

q5.resposta: Three types, based on layout: Type A (2 bedrooms, 1 bathroom), Type B (3 bedrooms, 1 bathroom) and Type C (4 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms). You can filter by type in the Home search.

q6.pergunta: How do I check an existing booking?
q6.resposta: Use the "My Booking" link in the navigation menu and enter the reference code you received when you created the booking.

q7.pergunta: Is the site available in other languages besides Portuguese?
q7.resposta: Yes — Chalé Online is available in Portuguese, English and Spanish. Use the language selector in the navigation menu to switch at any time.
